title: MekaNicht
description: Explore a thrilling modpack that combines Mekanism, Immersive Engineering, and CC:Tweaked. Dive into the world of Mekanism, but here’s the twist – you’ll need to master Immersive Engineering first to unlock all the Mekanism goodies!
body:
# Overview

In this modpack, players will find themselves immersed in the intricate world of Mekanism, where advanced machinery and automation await. But there's a twist – before delving into the wonders of Mekanism, you must first navigate the complexities of Immersive Engineering.


# Immersive Engineering

Well, create your first bit of Energy with Windmills, and build a Coke-Oven to get on a bit of Coke, it's better than Coal trust me!

# Mekanism

Once you've mastered the art of Immersive Engineering, the gates to Mekanism will swing wide open, revealing a plethora of advanced technologies and resources waiting to be exploited. From advanced ore processing to powerful energy systems, Mekanism offers a wealth of possibilities for those bold enough to seize them.

# CC:Tweaked

Computers in Minecraft!

# Challenges Await

But beware – you first need to get Constaton and the good old Immersive Enginnering Steel to start with Mekanism! 
Are you ready to embark on this exhilarating adventure?
